sentence: 她虔诚地在庙里祈祷。
pinyin: Tā qiánchéng de zài miào lǐ qídǎo.
english: She prayed devoutly at the temple.

sentence: 我的电脑硬盘快满了，要清理一下。
pinyin: Wǒ de diànnǎo yìngpán kuài mǎn le, yào qīnglǐ yīxià.
english: My computer's hard disk is almost full — I need to clean it up.

sentence: 我们参观了当地的历史纪念馆。
pinyin: Wǒmen cānguān le dāngdì de lìshǐ jìniànguǎn.
english: We visited the local history memorial museum.

sentence: 他受伤后肢体活动受到了限制。
pinyin: Tā shòu shāng hòu zhī tǐ huó dòng shòu dào le xiàn zhì.
english: After the injury, his limb movement was restricted.

sentence: 秋天院子里开满了菊花。
pinyin: Qiūtiān yuànzi lǐ kāi mǎn le júhuā.
english: In autumn the courtyard was full of blooming chrysanthemums.

sentence: 每天适度运动对身体很有好处。
pinyin: Měi tiān shì dù yùn dòng duì shēn tǐ hěn yǒu hǎo chù.
english: Moderate exercise every day is very beneficial for your health.

sentence: 园区主要吸引高新技术企业入驻。
pinyin: Yuánqū zhǔyào xīyǐn gāoxīn jìshù qǐyè rùzhù.
english: The park mainly attracts high-tech companies to set up there.

sentence: 买房时可以用公积金贷款。
pinyin: Mǎi fáng shí kě yǐ yòng gōng jī jīn dài kuǎn.
english: When buying a home, you can take out a loan using your provident fund.

meaning: towards; facing (sb or sth); (coll.) to side with; to favor
sentence: 妈妈总是向着弟弟，让我很委屈。
pinyin: Māma zǒng shì xiàng zhe dì di, ràng wǒ hěn wěi qū.
english: Mom always takes my younger brother's side, which makes me feel wronged.

sentence: 电讯行业发展越来越快。
pinyin: Diànxùn hángyè fāzhǎn yuè lái yuè kuài.
english: The telecommunications industry is developing faster and faster.

sentence: 这部动画片的配音非常专业。
pinyin: Zhè bù dònghuàpiàn de pèiyīn fēicháng zhuānyè.
english: The dubbing in this animated film is very professional.

meaning: 1. roof; 2. topmost part; 3. top (of tree, wall etc); 4. apex
sentence: 页面顶部有一个搜索框。
pinyin: Yèmiàn dǐngbù yǒu yī gè sōusuǒ kuàng.
english: There is a search box at the top of the page.

sentence: 新兵们搬进军营后开始了集训。
pinyin: Xīnbīng men bān jìn jūnyíng hòu kāishǐ le jíxùn.
english: After moving into the barracks, the recruits began intensive training.

sentence: 老师让我们解一道二次方程。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen jiě yī dào èrcì fāngchéng.
english: The teacher asked us to solve a quadratic equation.

meaning: 1. gunman; 2. sharpshooter; 3. sb who takes an exam for sb else; 4. sb
sentence: 考试时用枪手替考属于严重违规。
pinyin: Kǎoshì shí yòng qiāngshǒu tì kǎo shǔyú yánzhòng wéiguī.
english: Using a stand-in to take an exam for you is a serious violation.

sentence: 国会就这项法案召开了听证会。
pinyin: Guóhuì jiù zhè xiàng fǎ'àn zhàokāi le tīngzhènghuì.
english: Congress held a hearing on this bill.

meaning: 1. static; 2. sedate; 3. quiet; 4. passive; 5. (physics) static; 6. st
sentence: 这张静态图片看起来很有设计感。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng jìngtài túpiàn kàn qǐlái hěn yǒu shèjì gǎn.
english: This static image looks very well-designed.

meaning: 1. to fall; 2. to drop; 3. to decline; 4. to deteriorate; 5. to go dow
sentence: 这座老城镇随着工厂关闭而逐渐衰落。
pinyin: Zhè zuò lǎo chéngzhèn suízhe gōngchǎng guānbì ér zhújiàn shuāiluò.
english: This old town gradually declined as the factories closed.

sentence: 楼里的锅炉坏了，暖气今天没有。
pinyin: Lóu lǐ de guōlú huài le, nuǎnqì jīntiān méiyǒu.
english: The boiler in the building broke down, so there's no heating today.

meaning: 1. outer (of cabbage etc); 2. upper (of a shoe); 3. (coll.) group; 4.
sentence: 街上那帮子人每天晚上都聚在这里。
pinyin: Jiē shàng nà bāngzi rén měitiān wǎnshàng dōu jù zài zhèlǐ.
english: That gang of people on the street gathers here every evening.

meaning: 1. willing (to do sth); 2. to take pleasure in
sentence: 他一向乐于帮助有困难的邻居。
pinyin: Tā yīxiàng lèyú bāngzhù yǒu kùnnán de línjū.
english: He has always been willing to help neighbors in need.

sentence: 桂林山水风景如画，令人陶醉。
pinyin: Guìlín shānshuǐ fēngjǐng rúhuà, lìng rén táozuì.
english: The scenery of Guilin's mountains and rivers is picturesque and enchanting.

sentence: 他穿着定制西装出场，派头十足。
pinyin: Tā chuānzhe dìngzhì xīzhuāng chūchǎng, pàitóu shízú.
english: He appeared in a tailored suit, exuding panache.

sentence: 电路板上的接点生锈了，需要清洁。
pinyin: Diànlù bǎn shàng de jiēdiǎn shēng xiù le, xūyào qīngjié.
english: The electrical contacts on the circuit board are rusted and need cleaning.

meaning: 1. private room (in a restaurant, or for karaoke etc); 2. parlor; 3. b
sentence: 他们订了一个包间，庆祝朋友生日。
pinyin: Tāmen dìng le yī gè bāojiān, qìngzhù péngyǒu shēngrì.
english: They booked a private room to celebrate a friend's birthday.

sentence: 她在大学选修了一门神学课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiū le yī mén shénxué kèchéng.
english: She took a theology course as an elective at university.

sentence: 工业属于第二产业，是经济的重要组成部分。
pinyin: Gōng yè shǔ yú dì èr chǎn yè, shì jīng jì de zhòng yào zǔ chéng bù fen.
english: Industry belongs to the secondary sector and is an important part of the economy.

sentence: 医生说他这是假性近视，注意休息就好。
pinyin: Yī shēng shuō tā zhè shì jiǎ xìng jìn shì, zhù yì xiū xi jiù hǎo.
english: The doctor said he has pseudo-myopia and just needs to rest his eyes.

sentence: 大会主席团成员共有二十人。
pinyin: Dà huì zhǔ xí tuán chéng yuán gòng yǒu èr shí rén.
english: The presidium of the assembly has a total of twenty members.

meaning: educated youth; young intellectual; (historical) urban youth with form
sentence: 那个年代，大批知识青年下乡接受再教育。
pinyin: Nà ge nián dài, dà pī zhī shí qīng nián xià xiāng jiē shòu zài jiào yù.
english: In that era, large numbers of educated youth were sent to the countryside for re-education.

meaning: the specific model of a machine (e.g. cell phone model, laptop model,
sentence: 你用的是哪个机型？这款手机不错。
pinyin: Nǐ yòng de shì nǎ ge jī xíng? Zhè kuǎn shǒu jī bù cuò.
english: Which phone model are you using? This one looks pretty good.

sentence: 搜索引擎会自动对句子进行分词。
pinyin: Sōusuǒ yǐnqíng huì zìdòng duì jùzi jìnxíng fēncí.
english: Search engines automatically segment sentences into words.

sentence: 她们赢得了本届奥运会的女双金牌。
pinyin: Tāmen yíngdéle běn jiè Àoyùnhuì de nǚ shuāng jīnpái.
english: They won the women's doubles gold medal at this year's Olympics.

sentence: 这段代码可以复用，不需要重新写。
pinyin: Zhè duàn dàimǎ kěyǐ fùyòng, bù xūyào chóngxīn xiě.
english: This piece of code can be reused — no need to rewrite it.

sentence: 公司正在推进工作流程的规范化。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài tuījìn gōngzuò liúchéng de guīfànhuà.
english: The company is working on standardizing its work processes.

sentence: 请告诉我这个地方的经度和纬度。
pinyin: Qǐng gào su wǒ zhè ge dì fang de jīng dù hé wěi dù.
english: Please tell me the longitude and latitude of this place.

sentence: 他去领事馆申请了签证。
pinyin: Tā qù lǐngshì guǎn shēnqǐng le qiānzhèng.
english: He went to the consulate to apply for a visa.

sentence: 填表时需要填写配偶的姓名。
pinyin: Tián biǎo shí xū yào tián xiě pèi ǒu de xìng míng.
english: When filling out the form, you need to write your spouse's name.

sentence: 今天蓝天白云，心情特别好。
pinyin: Jīntiān lántiān báiyún, xīnqíng tèbié hǎo.
english: Blue sky and white clouds today — I'm in a great mood.

sentence: 站在山顶可以看到几座山峰。
pinyin: Zhàn zài shāndǐng kěyǐ kàndào jǐ zuò shānfēng.
english: Standing at the summit, you can see several mountain peaks.

meaning: 1. flowing (of speech, writing); 2. fluent; 3. smooth and easy
sentence: 他的中文说得很流畅。
pinyin: Tā de Zhōng wén shuō de hěn liú chàng.
english: His Chinese is very fluent.

meaning: 1. ceremonial robe; 2. formal attire (dinner suit, evening gown etc)
sentence: 她特意买了一件礼服参加婚礼。
pinyin: Tā tèyì mǎile yī jiàn lǐfú cānjiā hūnlǐ.
english: She bought a formal dress especially for the wedding.

sentence: 一个好老师要有扎实的专业素养。
pinyin: Yī gè hǎo lǎoshī yào yǒu zhāshi de zhuānyè sùyǎng.
english: A good teacher needs to have solid professional attainment.

sentence: 窗外的美景让我忘了时间。
pinyin: Chuāng wài de měi jǐng ràng wǒ wàng le shí jiān.
english: The beautiful scenery outside the window made me lose track of time.

sentence: 工作和生活之间要有清楚的界线。
pinyin: Gōngzuò hé shēnghuó zhī jiān yào yǒu qīngchǔ de jièxiàn.
english: There should be a clear boundary between work and personal life.

sentence: 面试那天他特意穿了一套西装。
pinyin: Miànshì nà tiān tā tèyì chuān le yī tào xīzhuāng.
english: On the day of his interview he deliberately wore a suit.

sentence: 这门科学史课让我了解了很多发明故事。
pinyin: Zhè mén kēxuéshǐ kè ràng wǒ liǎojiě le hěn duō fāmíng gùshì.
english: This history of science course taught me many stories about inventions.

sentence: 上海港是全球重要的航运中心。
pinyin: Shànghǎi gǎng shì quánqiú zhòngyào de hángyùn zhōngxīn.
english: Shanghai Port is an important global shipping hub.

sentence: 他赶上了最后一班班机回家。
pinyin: Tā gǎn shàng le zuìhòu yī bān bānjī huíjiā.
english: He caught the last flight home.

meaning: 1. dealer; 2. trader; 3. person engaged in some industry or trade
sentence: 当地业者联合起来反对新的收费政策。
pinyin: Dāngdì yèzhě liánhé qǐlái fǎnduì xīn de shōufèi zhèngcè.
english: Local traders joined together to oppose the new fee policy.
